languages.original_text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."

languages.text: "Плоть допущенных сюда мирян слаба, но уровень аугментирования экипажа растет. Оптимизация команды во славу Омниссии продвигается удовлетворительно".
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to medbay after the Rogue Trader allowed the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."

languages.text: 「この聖域に参入した信徒の肉体は弱いが、乗組員の強化レベルは上昇している。オムニシアの栄光のために乗組員を最適化している」
languages.original_text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."

traits.locale_text: 「この聖域に参入した信徒の肉体は弱いが、乗組員の強化レベルは上昇している。オムニシアの栄光のために乗組員を最適化している」

languages.text: « La chair des profanes soignés ici est faible, mais le niveau d'augmentation de l'équipage augmente peu à peu. L'optimisation du personnel de bord pour la gloire de l'Omnimessie progresse de manière satisfaisante. »
languages.original_text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."

traits.locale_text: « La chair des profanes soignés ici est faible, mais le niveau d'augmentation de l'équipage augmente peu à peu. L'optimisation du personnel de bord pour la gloire de l'Omnimessie progresse de manière satisfaisante. »

languages.text: "Das Fleisch der hier behandelten Laien ist schwach, aber das Augmentationsniveau der Crew steigt. Die Optimierung der Besatzung für den Ruhm des Omnissiah schreitet zufriedenstellend voran."
languages.original_text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."

traits.locale_text: "Das Fleisch der hier behandelten Laien ist schwach, aber das Augmentationsniveau der Crew steigt. Die Optimierung der Besatzung für den Ruhm des Omnissiah schreitet zufriedenstellend voran."

languages.text: "Buraya kabul edilen ruhban olmayan kimselerin eti zayıf ancak mürettebatın ogmentasyon seviyesi artıyor. Hermesih'in şanı için mürettebatın optimizasyonu, tatmin edici bir şekilde ilerliyor."
languages.original_text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."

traits.locale_text: "Buraya kabul edilen ruhban olmayan kimselerin eti zayıf ancak mürettebatın ogmentasyon seviyesi artıyor. Hermesih'in şanı için mürettebatın optimizasyonu, tatmin edici bir şekilde ilerliyor."

languages.text: «La carne de los seglares ingresados aquí es débil, pero cada vez se les bendice con más aumentos. La optimización de la tripulación por la gloria del Omnissiah progresa satisfactoriamente».
languages.original_text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."

traits.locale_text: «La carne de los seglares ingresados aquí es débil, pero cada vez se les bendice con más aumentos. La optimización de la tripulación por la gloria del Omnissiah progresa satisfactoriamente».

languages.text: “在此接受治疗的教外人的血肉固然脆弱，但船员的植入物水平正在稳步提升。欧姆尼赛亚的荣光在上，船员的优化工作进展顺利。”
languages.original_text: "The flesh of the laypersons admitted here is weak, but the augmentation level of the crew is increasing. Optimisation of the crew for the glory of the Omnissiah is progressing satisfactorily."
